module.name: host
module.purpose: Host crate for tool execution management. session.rs implements HostSession, which connects to the agent host bind address, owns the per-connection Executor, and pumps inbound agent SessionMessage envelopes into Executor::route_session_event. HostSession exposes package_message(SessionEvent) -> SessionMessage, which the executor and execution runtimes use to wrap outbound events. The executor folder module owns host-side tool execution: Executor::new(agent_tx) stores the shared agent sender, builds a ToolRegistry and WorkQueue of ExecutionRuntime records, exposes preview, answers ExecutionEvent::PreviewQuery by emitting ExecutionEvent::Preview with current tool previews via HostSession::package_message, intercepts ExecutionEvent::Evoke into create_execution, and forwards other execution events to the tracked runtime. registry.rs implements ToolRegistry, the execution child module implements ExecutionRuntime/ExecutionContext, and tool.rs owns the host-local executable Tool handle.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Executor folder module owning tool preview and a single route_session_event router over host-side tool execution. Executor::new(agent_tx) stores the shared agent SessionMessage sender, builds a ToolRegistry and active ExecutionRuntime WorkQueue, preview delegates to the registry, route_session_event answers ExecutionEvent::PreviewQuery by packaging Preview tools through HostSession::package_message, intercepts ExecutionEvent::Evoke into create_execution, and forwards other execution events through forward_to_execution.
